name: MISRA C++: Re-categorization in GRP
description: Any change to a guideline's category is documented in the Guidelines Re-categorization Plan (GRP).
rationale: MISRA Compliance:2020: the GRP records all agreed category changes for the project before they take effect.

examples.fails: the required compliance artifact/step is absent

source: MISRA Compliance:2020 — Achieving compliance with MISRA Coding Guidelines, applied to MISRA C++:2023. https://misra.org.uk/
